_defaults.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
_defaults.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Dakshineswar Kali Temple
temples.description: A famous Kali temple on the eastern bank of the Hooghly River, associated with Sri Ramakrishna and Bengal's navaratna temple architecture.

temples.name: Kalighat Kali Temple
temples.description: One of Kolkata's most important Kali shrines and a major pilgrimage destination in West Bengal.

temples.name: Tarapith Temple
temples.location: Tarapith, near Rampurhat, Birbhum District, West Bengal
temples.description: A famous temple town near Rampurhat, known for the temple of Goddess Tara and its associated tantric traditions.

temples.name: Baba Taraknath Temple
temples.description: A major Shiva pilgrimage shrine at Tarakeswar, built in 1729 according to Hooghly district administration.

temples.name: Belur Math Temple
temples.description: The temple heart of Belur Math, headquarters of Ramakrishna Math and Ramakrishna Mission on the west bank of the Hooghly River.
